overview: Premier Functional Medicine in Chandler provides personalized, root-cause focused wellness through functional medicine, hormone replacement, and aesthetic treatments. The clinic emphasizes detailed evaluation and customized care plans rather than symptom-focused quick fixes.
highlights: Advanced testing for hormones, nutrients, gut health, and inflammation markers
IV therapy with multiple formulations (NAD, B12, Glutathione, Lipo-C, and others)
Bioidentical hormone replacement and peptide therapy
targetAudience: People who want to actively manage their health and address root causes of fatigue, hormonal imbalance, and chronic issues.
